parameters.subject: You are Invited — Ascend IU Upcoming Event
parameters.message:
=Hi {{  $json.Name }},

We hope this message finds you well! On behalf of Ascend IU, we are thrilled to invite you to our upcoming event.

We would love to see you there and reconnect with fellow alumni. Please fill out the interest form below to let us know if you'll be able to join us:

[Interest Form Link]

Event Overview:
- Date: TBD
- Location: TBD
- Details: More information will be shared upon registration

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email. We look forward to hearing from you!

Best,
Ascend IU

parameters.subject: We are so excited to see you!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Check Stage 2 Not Sent').item.json.Name }},

Thank you so much for confirming your attendance! We are absolutely thrilled to have you join us at the upcoming Ascend IU event.

More details will be on their way to you shortly. If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

We can't wait to see you there!

Warm regards,
Ascend IU

parameters.subject: Thank you for letting us know
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Check Stage 2 Not Sent').item.json.Name }},

Thank you for letting us know that you won't be able to make it this time. We completely understand and truly appreciate you taking the time to respond.

We hope to see you at a future Ascend IU event and will keep you in the loop for upcoming opportunities!

Best wishes,
Ascend IU

parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Stage}="Invited", {Stage 2 Sent}=FALSE(), DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {Last Email Sent Date}, "days") >= 7)

parameters.subject: Just checking in — Ascend IU Event
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.Name }},

We wanted to follow up on our previous message regarding the upcoming Ascend IU event. We noticed we haven't heard back from you yet and wanted to make sure you didn't miss out!

If you're interested in attending, please take a moment to fill out the form below:

[Interest Form Link]

We'd love to have you join us and reconnect with the Ascend IU community. If you have any questions or need more information, feel free to reply to this email.

Hope to hear from you soon!

Best,
Ascend IU

parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Status}="Approved", {Stage}="Confirmed", IS_SAME({Scheduled Date}, TODAY(), "day"), {Last Email Sent}="Path A Response")

parameters.subject: Important Update — Ascend IU Event Details
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.Name }},

We're excited to share the details for our upcoming Ascend IU event!

- Date: [Event Date]
- Time: [Event Time]
- Location: [Event Location]

Logistics:
[Additional logistics details here]

We look forward to seeing you there!

Best,
Ascend IU

parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Status}="Approved", {Stage}="Update Sent", IS_SAME({Scheduled Date}, TODAY(), "day"), {Last Email Sent}="Update Email")

parameters.subject: Thank you for joining us — Ascend IU
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.Name }},

Thank you so much for joining us at the Ascend IU event! It was wonderful to see you and reconnect with our alumni community.

We'd love to hear your thoughts! Please take a moment to fill out our feedback form:

[Feedback Google Form Link]

Your input helps us make future events even better.

With gratitude,
Ascend IU
